total_cost_logical.name: total_cost_logical
total_cost_logical.value: "inventory_movements"."total_cost" IS NULL OR "inventory_movements"."unit_cost" IS NULL OR "inventory_movements"."total_cost" = "inventory_movements"."unit_cost" * "inventory_movements"."quantity"

cut_completed_at_valid.name: cut_completed_at_valid
cut_completed_at_valid.value: "rolls"."cut_completed_at" IS NULL OR ("rolls"."cut_completed_at" >= "rolls"."created_at" AND ("rolls"."printed_at" IS NULL OR "rolls"."cut_completed_at" >= "rolls"."printed_at"))
